verses.text: Amah kumpi a suaksak dingin Israel khempeuh Shekhem-ah pai ahih manin Shekhem-ah Rehoboam pai hi
Nebat' tapa Jeroboam in tua thu a zak ciangin (bang hang hiam cih leh Kumpi Solomon kiang panin a taina Egypt-ah amah omlai hi), Egypt panin Jeroboam hong ciahkik hi
Amaute in mi sawlin amah samkik uh a, tua ciangin Jeroboam leh Israel khempeuh hong pai-in Rehoboam kiangah
“Na pa in hong gimbawlin vangik hong suan hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in na pa' nasep haksa leh kote' vangik hong zangsak in la, kote in nangma na kong sem ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Ni thum sung a hun hong pia un la, tua ciangin hong paikik un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in a pa Solomon a nun'tak lai-a a mai-ah a ding khangham mite thu kuppih a, “Hih mite ka dawn'na ding ngaihsutna hong bangci piak na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amaute in ama kiangah, “Hih mite tungah nang dik in la, amaute lungkimsakin amaute tungah kam hoih pau lecin, amaute nangma nasem hi tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin khanghamte in a piak ngaihsutna nusia-in, amah tawh a khangkhawm, ama mai-ah a ding khangnote thu a kuppih hi
Amah in amaute kiangah, “Kei kiangah, ‘Na pa in kote tungah hong suat vangik zangsak in,’ a hong ci hih mite i dawn'na ding bang ngaihsutna hong pia na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah tawh a khangkhawm khangnote in ama kiangah, “Nangma kiangah, ‘Na pa in vangik hong suan hi; ahih hangin kote-a' dingin hong zangsak in,’ hong ci hih mite kiangah hih bangin gen in, ‘Ka khutmeno pen ka pa' kawng sangin lianzaw hi

Tu-in ka pa in note tungah vangik hong suatna-ah keimah in na vangik uh ka behlap ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi; ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,’ ci in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in, “Kei kiangah ni thum ni-in hong paikik un,” a cih mah bangin Jeroboam leh mi khempeuh a ni thum ni-in Rehoboam kiangah hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in amaute ngawh dawn'in, khangham mite' ngaihsutna nusia a

“Ka pa in note vangik hong suan hi; ahih hangin keimah in ka hong behlap lai ding hi. Ka pa in ciang tawh note hong thuhilh hi; ahih hangin keimah in ciang lingnei tawh note kong thuhilh ding hi,” ci-in khangnote' ngaihsut piakna bangin Kumpi Rehoboam in amaute kiangah a gen hi

Tua hih ciangin kumpipa in hih mite' thu ngailo hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Shiloh mi Ahijah' tung tawnin Nebat' tapa Jeroboam tungah a thugente Topa in a tun'sak theihna dingin Pasian in a pian'sak thu kiheina ahi hi

Kumpipa in amaute' thu a ngaihlohna Israel mi khempeuh in a muh uh ciangin mite in kumpipa dawngin, “David' sungah kote in bang ngah nei ka hi uh hiam? Jessi' tapa' sungah gamhluah ka nei kei uh hi. Israel-te aw, na inn ciat uhah ciah un. Rehoboam in ama-a' ding vaihawm tawm ta hen,” a ci uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin Israel mi khempeuh a inn ciat uhah kihem uh hi
Ahih hangin Judah khuapite-ah a teng Israel mite tungah Rehoboam in a uk hi

Tua ciangin Kumpi Rehoboam in aana tawh na a kisemsakte a uk nasep ukpa Hadoram Israel-te kiangah sawl a, Israel mite in suang tawh amah na denglum uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a tai dingin Kumpi Rehoboam a leeng tungah a tuang dingin nawhtat hi
Tua ahih ciangin tuni dongin leilu lama om Israel-te in David innkuan lehdo uh hi.
